items.title: Vitel Lawes could make West Indies debut without professional game
items.summary: The 19-year left-arm wristspinner has been included to face New Zealand in Guyana
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Sean Payton mused about stepping down for Bill Belichick, until he broke wins record
items.summary: A new article from Seth Wickersham of ESPN takes a look at Broncos coach Sean Payton's hectic week before the AFC Championship.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Switzerland beat Colombia on penalties to reach quarter-finals
items.summary: Gregor Kobel is Switzerland's penalty hero, after pulling off a stunning shootout save from Colombia's Cucho Hernandez to help set up a quarter-final clash with Argentina.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
